name: opencti-mcp
instructions: Use this backend for threat intelligence context and IOC enrichment. Treat intelligence as supporting context that must be correlated with case evidence.

authority_contract.authority_disclaimer: This add-on is a derived/reference plane. It does not authorize cases, seal evidence, approve findings, approve reports, or bypass Gateway. All outputs are supporting context only.

tools.name: cti_get_health
tools.description: Check OpenCTI server connectivity and API health.
tools.when_to_use: Use to confirm OpenCTI API readiness before relying on CTI lookups.
tools.output_notes: Health/status output only; it is not case evidence.

tools.name: cti_search_threat_intel
tools.description: Broad search across all OpenCTI entity types: indicators, threat actors, malware, techniques, CVEs, and reports.
tools.when_to_use: Use for broad CTI discovery when you have a keyword, malware family, actor, CVE, or campaign term.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid using broad matches as attribution or root-cause evidence without corroborating case artifacts.
tools.output_notes: Returns intelligence entities and context; correlate with observed case indicators.

tools.name: cti_search_entity
tools.description: Search OpenCTI entities filtered by a single type (more precise than cti_search_threat_intel).
tools.when_to_use: Use when you know the desired OpenCTI entity type and need a more precise search.
tools.output_notes: Returns matching entities; use entity IDs with detail/relationship tools for deeper context.

tools.name: cti_lookup_ioc
tools.description: Look up a specific IOC (IP, hash, domain, or URL) and return full context.
tools.when_to_use: Use after extracting a concrete IOC from case evidence.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid looking up speculative indicators that have not been observed in evidence.
tools.output_notes: IOC context is supporting evidence; preserve the source artifact that produced the IOC.

tools.name: cti_get_recent_indicators
tools.description: Get recently added IOCs from the last N days.
tools.when_to_use: Use for situational awareness during active incident response when recent indicators may matter.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid bulk-pivoting on recent IOCs without a case-specific hypothesis or observed overlap.

tools.name: cti_get_entity
tools.description: Get full details for a specific entity by its OpenCTI UUID.
tools.when_to_use: Use after search returns an entity ID that needs full context.
tools.output_notes: Returns detailed CTI fields for a known entity.

tools.name: cti_get_relationships
tools.description: Get relationships for an entity (who uses it, what it indicates, what it targets, etc.).
tools.when_to_use: Use to understand CTI relationships after selecting a relevant entity.
tools.avoid_when: Avoid converting relationships into attribution without independent evidence.

tools.name: cti_search_reports
tools.description: Search threat intelligence reports by keyword (campaign name, threat actor, malware family, CVE).
tools.when_to_use: Use when narrative report context may explain observed case indicators or techniques.
tools.output_notes: Reports are contextual references; quote sparingly and tie back to case artifacts.
